---
title: "Research"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

I work on higher education, academic labor markets, causal machine learning, and meta-research. I am especially interested in what we can learn when messy administrative, bibliometric, and institutional data are linked carefully.

## Publications

{{< include research/_data/publications.md >}}

## Working Areas

::: {.quick-grid}

::: {.sketch-card}
### Academic Careers

Dissertations, publications, mobility, and institutional trajectories in European higher education systems.
:::

::: {.sketch-card}
### Methods

Causal machine learning, entity resolution, econometrics, and reproducible data pipelines.
:::

::: {.sketch-card}
### Meta-Research

Publication bias, robustness, and how evidence changes when selective reporting is modeled explicitly.
:::

:::
